title: Buyer Questionnaire
description: Answer these questions to create the buyer-side document checklist. Agents prepare and send forms in their e-sign system, then upload the signed copies here.

questions.label: Where is this buyer in the transaction?
questions.help_text: Buyer representation documents are always included. Contract and closing placeholders are added once the buyer is preparing an offer or under contract.

questions.label: What type of property is the buyer pursuing?
How will the buyer finance the purchase?
Was the property built before 1978?
questions.help_text: Lead-based paint disclosures are commonly required for residential properties built before 1978.

questions.label: Is the property subject to an HOA, POA, condo association, or mandatory membership association?
Is the property in a special taxing or assessment district?
questions.help_text: Examples include MUD, PID, improvement district, or similar district notices.

questions.label: Does the buyer need to sell another property to purchase this one?
Is a temporary residential lease or special possession timing expected?
Will a referral fee be paid for this buyer?

document_rules.name: Information About Brokerage Services
document_rules.reason: Required for buyer representation

document_rules.name: Residential Buyer/Tenant Representation Agreement
document_rules.reason: Required written buyer representation agreement

document_rules.name: Wire Fraud Warning
document_rules.reason: Recommended for all buyer transactions

document_rules.name: One to Four Family Residential Contract
document_rules.reason: Buyer is preparing an offer or under contract on a resale one-to-four family property

document_rules.name: Residential Condominium Contract
document_rules.reason: Buyer is preparing an offer or under contract on a condominium

document_rules.name: New Home Contract - Completed Construction
document_rules.reason: Buyer is preparing an offer or under contract on completed new construction

document_rules.name: New Home Contract - Incomplete Construction
document_rules.reason: Buyer is preparing an offer or under contract on incomplete new construction

document_rules.name: Farm and Ranch Contract
document_rules.reason: Buyer is preparing an offer or under contract on farm and ranch property

document_rules.name: Purchase Contract
document_rules.reason: Buyer is preparing an offer or under contract and the contract type is not yet known

document_rules.name: Seller's Disclosure Notice
document_rules.reason: Commonly needed once a buyer is preparing an offer or under contract

document_rules.name: Pre-Approval Letter or Proof of Funds
document_rules.reason: Commonly included with buyer offers

document_rules.name: Earnest Money / Option Fee Receipt
document_rules.reason: Tracks buyer funds after contract execution

document_rules.name: Inspection Report
document_rules.reason: Common buyer due diligence document

document_rules.name: Amendment to Contract / Repair Amendment
document_rules.reason: Commonly used after inspections or negotiation

document_rules.name: Survey
document_rules.reason: Common contract and title document

document_rules.name: Title Commitment
document_rules.reason: Commonly received during closing process

document_rules.name: Closing Disclosure / Final Settlement Statement
document_rules.reason: Needed before closing

document_rules.name: Third Party Financing Addendum
document_rules.reason: Buyer financing is third-party or not yet known

document_rules.name: Addendum for Seller's Disclosure of Information on Lead-Based Paint
document_rules.reason: Property may have been built before 1978

document_rules.name: Addendum for Property Subject to Mandatory Membership in Owners' Association
document_rules.reason: Property may be subject to an HOA, POA, condo, or mandatory membership association

document_rules.name: Subdivision Information / Resale Certificate
document_rules.reason: Association resale or subdivision information may be needed

document_rules.name: Notice to Purchaser of Real Property Located in a Special Taxing or Assessment District
document_rules.reason: Property may be located in a special taxing or assessment district

document_rules.name: Addendum for Sale of Other Property by Buyer
document_rules.reason: Buyer needs to sell another property

document_rules.name: Buyer's Temporary Residential Lease
document_rules.reason: Buyer may need temporary occupancy before closing

document_rules.name: Seller's Temporary Residential Lease
document_rules.reason: Seller may need temporary occupancy after closing

document_rules.name: Referral Agreement
document_rules.reason: Referral fee will be paid
